title: ChatGPT vs. Claude — Which AI Assistant Will Rule the Developer’s Desk?
author: Dhruvdeep Singh
text:

ChatGPT vs. Claude — Which AI Assistant Will Rule the Developer’s Desk?
Read on for an in-depth breakdown!

In the fast-moving world of artificial intelligence, two names seem to be on every developer’s lips: ChatGPT and Claude. Both are large language models, both have passionate supporters, and both are competing to be the tool developers reach for when they need reliable help.
Well, they might look similar from the outside, but they were built with different goals in mind. And those differences matter more than you might think.
Where It All Started
OpenAI’s ChatGPT burst onto the scene in late 2022 and quickly became the default way people interacted with AI…
